states.name: Shuten-Douji
states.title: Degenerate Oni Queen
states.description:
Tonight, as the moon brushes stray clouds away, its light falls on the beautiful cherry blossoms that mark the end of winter—ah, no, no. It falls on a bewitching oni monarch, whose arrival marks the end of the human world. Those who dare take but one look at her can smell a flowery scent in the air, can hear laughter ringing out like a bell.
In the end, they get to know why at times cherries bloom in red.

states.name: Shuten-Douji
states.title: Degenerate Oni Queen
states.description:
Touch repaid with destruction, smile—with fear, trust—with betrayal. There are only those who have power and those who don't. Those with horns and those without them. And in both cases, a world in which the latter outnumber the former was one too weak for the Oni Queen's liking, too small. She isn't kind about it—she'll be out tonight as well, destroying, devouring, amusing herself, as the mysterious Shuten-Douji should.
Makes you wonder what came first—the stones being thrown at the mere sight of horns, or the oni girl wishing for freedom.

states.name: Shuten-Douji
states.title: Degenerate Oni Queen
states.description:
Always seeking pleasure in any shape or form, she indulges each and every one of her whims—and drinks to excess wherever she goes. She's free, unfettered, and so she doesn't need to bother telling dreams and reality apart. It's only natural that they call her Shuten, a drunkard. Who knows if she herself remembers her actual name.
Have a drink with her, and the next thing to quench her thirst might be your blood.
